# 科技商业观察候选源｜2099-01-05

筛选口径：覆盖科技公司、平台政策、AI/芯片/云、监管、安全事件、开源生态与商业落地；排除娱乐八卦、购物推荐、普通融资快讯、营销稿和纯教程。

候选数量：12
抓取失败源：无

## 1. EU opens formal investigation into app store platform rules

- 来源：The Verge
- 分类：regulation
- 发布时间：2099-01-04T12:00:00.000Z
- 链接：https://www.theverge.com/2099/1/4/eu-app-store-platform-rules
- 摘要证据：EU regulators opened a formal investigation into app store platform rules, focusing on developer payments, steering restrictions and marketplace access.

- 摘要证据：CISA added multiple enterprise identity vulnerabilities to its exploited catalog and urged agencies to patch within a short deadline.
